_meta.description: Benchmark baselines for regression detection. Updated on each release.
_meta.methodology: RawBenchmark v2 — greedy sampler (topK=1), 256 decode tokens, no MTP, first-turn (no warmup)

baselines.notes: Baseline from initial benchmark run. SDK decode includes Metal shader JIT on first run.
Mobile GPU variant — slightly slower decode, optimized for mobile power envelope.
Gemma 3n — smaller architecture, lower throughput but more memory efficient.
CPU (XNNPACK) fallback — 3.5x slower than GPU. Used when Metal unavailable or for parity testing.

baselines.source: iPhone 16 Pro Max — 2026-06-19T01:18:55Z — Release build, single run from device benchmark-results.jsonl (runId: B3F04433)
baselines.notes: Real device measurement (Release build, single run). Prior Debug build measured 14.04 tok/s decode. For production baselines, re-run with 3 iterations averaged, airplane mode, warmup discarded.

sdk_ttft_s.description: Time to first token — user-perceived latency

wall_pure_decode_tok_s.description: Wall-clock decode speed — ground truth throughput

decode_p95_latency_ms.description: P95 latency — tail latency (high variance expected)

model_load_time_s.description: Model load time — varies with cache state

change_log.author: automation
change_log.description: Removed fabricated iPhone 16 Pro Max estimated baseline (45.0 tok/s, ~3x higher than measured ~14 tok/s). Moved to pending_baselines with honest TBD status. Will be re-added after controlled device run.

change_log.author: automation
change_log.description: Initial baseline establishment with production-grade test infrastructure

change_log.author: manual
change_log.description: Initial baseline establishment — MacBook Pro M4 Max, 4 model/backend combos
